title: wendlandia scabra var. tenasserimensis
intro: Wendlandia scabra var. tenasserimensis is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. Wendlandia scabra var. tenasserimensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
